title: EB2103_11.F.52_2520_202310251021 is available
description:
New version: EB2103_11.F.52_2520_202310251021

This update improves system security.

System

 • Integrates the November 2023 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
